text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's that time of year again, folks! We're kicking
off the Classic Triple Crown with the Satsuki Sho,
and everyone's attention is on Mihono Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
There are concerns about her aptitude for a race
of this distance, but I say it's no big deal! I bet
she can do 2,000 meters, no problem!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
At her current level, she can hold her own against
last year's winner, Tokai Teio, so expectations are
higher than ever!

The racetrack is abuzz with excitement when
Mihono Bourbon makes her entrance. Meanwhile,
in the runners' tunnel...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But I'm also... Even I can...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Rice, you can do this!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, um, well, we'll be racing together today, so...
I'm, um, very happy, and...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best out there!

Rice Shower extends a trembling hand to Mihono
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! I-I'm sorry! I knew that would be too forward!

Mihono Bourbon takes Rice Shower's hand just as
she tries to pull away.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best out there, Rice Shower.

The first race of the Classic Triple Crown, the
Satsuki Sho, is about to begin!
